mapper.select: SELECT a.PERSON_ID, a.CREATE_DATE, a.ACTIVITY, a.ORDERNO, a.MODIFY_YN, he.EMPID as EMP_ID, he.LOCAL_NAME as EMP_NAME, hd.ORG_NAME_LOCAL as DEPT_NAME FROM AR_SUPERVISOR a LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE he ON a.PERSON_ID = he.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT hd ON he.DEPTNO = hd.DEPTNO WHERE a.ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY a.ORDERNO DESC, a.CREATE_DATE DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE AR_SUPERVISOR SET ACTIVITY = #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, ORDERNO = #{orderno, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, MODIFY_YN = #{modifyYn, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP} WHERE PERSON_ID = #{personId}
mapper.select: SELECT DEPTNO as "id", PARENT_DEPT_NO as "parent", ORG_NAME_LOCAL as "text" FROM HR_DEPARTMENT WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY ORDERNO ASC
SELECT DEPTNO FROM AR_SUPERVISOR_INFO WHERE PERSON_ID = #{personId} AND ACTIVITY = 1

SELECT d.DEPTNO as "id", d.ORG_NAME_LOCAL as "text", d.PARENT_DEPT_NO as "parent" FROM HR_DEPARTMENT d INNER JOIN AR_SUPERVISOR_INFO si ON d.DEPTNO = si.DEPTNO WHERE d.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId} AND si.PERSON_ID = #{adminID} AND d.ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY d.DEPT_LEVEL ASC, d.DEPTNO ASC
